nasb.text: For He has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses, by just so much as the builder of the house has more honor than the house.

esv.text: For Jesus has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses—as much more glory as the builder of a house has more honor than the house itself.

cnv.text: 他比摩西配得更大的榮耀，好像建造房屋的人比房屋配得更大的尊貴一樣。

ccb.text: 然而祂却比摩西配得更大的荣耀，因为建造房子的人当然比房子更尊贵。

csbs.text: 事实上，这个人被看为比摩西配得更大的荣耀，就像建造房屋的人比房屋本身更有尊荣那样，
